support.greeting_sub: Our team is here to help with any questions or issues. We respond within 24h on business days.
support.question_desc: Protocol doubts, recipe questions, or anything about the app.
support.refund_desc: Not satisfied? We honour our 30-day refund policy.
support.faq_q1: How and when should I take the protocol?
support.faq_a1: Prenez le shot Pink Salt Burn 15 a 30 minutes avant le premier repas, ou en fin d apres-midi si vos envies arrivent plus tard. Melangez le sel rose dans l eau, puis ajoutez citron, vinaigre de cidre, gingembre et cannelle. N ajoutez pas de sucre.
support.faq_q2: What should I do if I see no results in the first week?
support.faq_a2: Results vary per person. In the first 7 days your body is adapting. Keep logging your weight daily in the calendar — small daily changes add up. If after 14 days you still see nothing, contact our support team.
support.faq_q3: Is the protocol safe if I am under medical treatment?
support.faq_a3: The ingredients are all natural, but if you are under medical treatment or have a chronic condition, please consult your doctor before starting any new nutritional protocol.
support.faq_q4: How do I update my personal data in the app?
support.faq_a4: Scroll up to the 'My Profile' section on this page and update any field you need. Tap 'Save Changes' to confirm. Your personalized recipe doses will be recalculated automatically.
support.faq_q5: How long does the refund process take?
support.faq_a5: After receiving your refund request, our team will respond within 24 business hours. Approved refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days depending on your payment method.
support.contact_note: You can also reach us directly at
support.response_time: ⏱ We respond within 24h on business days

recipes.title: Your recipes for this week, tailored to your profile, {{name}}!
recipes.reason_high_loss: Choisie pour augmenter la satiete, soutenir les proteines et garder un deficit plus stable.
recipes.reason_med_loss: Choisie pour un equilibre entre fibres, proteines et repas faciles a tenir.
recipes.reason_low_loss: Choisie pour une routine legere, fit et durable.

gelatin_burn.title: Shot Pink Salt Burn
gelatin_burn.description: Le shot principal ajuste a votre poids actuel pour soutenir la routine minceur.
gelatin_burn.benefit: Hydratation, controle des envies et routine simple avant les repas.
gelatin_burn.time: 15 a 30 minutes avant le premier repas, ou en fin d apres-midi si les envies arrivent plus tard.
gelatin_burn.ing_1: {{amount}}g de sel rose de l Himalaya fin
gelatin_burn.step_1: Melangez le sel rose dans l eau jusqu a dissolution complete.
gelatin_burn.step_2: Ajoutez le citron, le vinaigre de cidre, le gingembre et la cannelle. Remuez pendant 20 secondes.
gelatin_burn.step_3: Buvez lentement. Ne depassez pas une dose par jour et gardez votre cible calorique.

green_smoothie.title: Green Protein Breakfast Smoothie
green_smoothie.description: A high-satiety start to your day to avoid cravings.
green_smoothie.benefit: Slow-release energy and blood sugar stabilization.
green_smoothie.step_1: Blend all ingredients until completely smooth.

detox_water.title: Ginger and Lemon Detox Water
detox_water.description: Refreshing daily detox water to sip on.
detox_water.benefit: Liver detoxification and reduction of water retention.
detox_water.step_1: Combine all ingredients in a jug.
detox_water.step_2: Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before drinking.

egg_bowl.title: High Protein Egg & Veggie Bowl
egg_bowl.description: A satisfying, protein-packed meal for muscle preservation.
egg_bowl.benefit: Lean muscle preservation and 4-6 hours sustained satiety.
egg_bowl.step_1: Sauté the vegetables in olive oil for 5 minutes. Add beaten eggs and cook until set.

apple_oats.title: Cinnamon Apple Overnight Oats
apple_oats.benefit: Feeds beneficial gut bacteria to support natural GLP-1.
apple_oats.step_1: Mix all ingredients in a jar the night before and refrigerate overnight.

veg_soup.title: Fat Burning Vegetable Soup
veg_soup.benefit: Extreme low-calorie density to support metabolic function.
veg_soup.step_1: Sauté onion and garlic. Add remaining veg and stock, simmer for 20 minutes.

berry_bowl.title: Pomegranate Antioxidant Bowl
berry_bowl.benefit: High concentration of polyphenols to reduce inflammation and support GIP.
berry_bowl.step_1: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and serve.

golden_milk.title: Turmeric Golden Milk
golden_milk.description: Soothing evening drink to prep hormones.
golden_milk.benefit: Powerful anti-inflammatory action for optimal hormone flow.
golden_milk.step_1: Whisk all ingredients together into the warm milk.

salmon.title: Grilled Salmon & Broccoli
salmon.benefit: Omega-3s reduce inflammation for deep fat burning.
salmon.step_1: Season salmon with lemon, oil, and dill. Grill for 12 mins.
salmon.step_2: Steam the broccoli for 8 minutes and serve together.

chia_pudding.title: Chia & Coconut Pudding
chia_pudding.description: High-fiber treat to sustain fat-burning windows.
chia_pudding.benefit: High fiber regulates blood sugar and sustains fat-burning.
chia_pudding.step_1: Mix chia, milk, and vanilla. Refrigerate 4+ hours, top with fruit.

salt_burn.title: Shot Pink Salt Burn
salt_burn.description: Le shot principal ajuste a votre poids actuel pour soutenir la routine minceur.
salt_burn.benefit: Hydratation, controle des envies et routine simple avant les repas.
salt_burn.time: 15 a 30 minutes avant le premier repas, ou en fin d apres-midi si les envies arrivent plus tard.

morning_salt.title: Eau Pink Salt citron du matin
morning_salt.description: Une version douce pour commencer la journee sans boisson sucree.
morning_salt.benefit: Hydratation, routine metabolique et controle des fringales du matin.
morning_salt.time: Au reveil ou 20 minutes avant le petit-dejeuner
morning_salt.ing_3: Le jus d un demi citron
morning_salt.ing_4: 3 feuilles de menthe ou quelques glacons
morning_salt.step_1: Melangez tous les ingredients dans un grand verre.
morning_salt.step_2: Buvez lentement, puis prenez un repas riche en proteines.

night_shot.title: Shot anti-envies du soir
night_shot.description: Une option legere pour remplacer le grignotage sucre.
night_shot.benefit: Aide a fermer la journee sans excedent calorique.
night_shot.time: Apres le diner si une envie sucree apparait
night_shot.ing_3: 1 cuillere a cafe de jus de citron
night_shot.ing_5: Quelques gouttes de stevia si necessaire
night_shot.step_1: Melangez, buvez lentement, puis evitez de reprendre des calories apres.
